nasb.text: Also you shall not neglect the Levite who is in your town, for he has no portion or inheritance among you.

esv.text: And you shall not neglect the Levite who is within your towns, for he has no portion or inheritance with you.

cnv.text: 住在你城裡的利未人，你不可丟棄他，因為他在你們中間無分無業。

ccb.text: 不可忘记住在你们城里的利未人，因为利未人没有分到土地作产业。
